issues.title: SpringBoot SpringAI vsrsion
issues.body: What is the minimum springboot version number supported by springai? Can springboot2.x be supported? Why can't I support the lower version of springboot?

comments.body:
Spring AI uses `RestClient` introduced with Spring Framework 6.1. If not mistaken Spring Boot 3.1 is the lowest version that supports 6.1
So Spring AI would likely work with Spring Boot 3.1 and above.
Thank you for your answer. I understand now
